introSection: Titánide is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. The ride was called Tizona from 2003 to 2008.
fullText: Titánide is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. The ride was called Tizona from 2003 to 2008.
